benefits.description: 90lbs weight loss over approximately one year

protocol_notes: User has been on tirzepatide for approximately one year at 7mg weekly dose. Currently experiencing weight loss plateau for about one month with approximately 80lbs remaining to goal weight. Unable to tolerate doses higher than 7mg. Using 2ml BAC water for reconstitution. Inquiring about potential Tirzepatide-Retatrutide blend dosing but ultimately decided to continue with tirzepatide and potentially switch to full retatrutide later.
